visual: Shoulder-width parallel stance with both arms crossing in front of the chest, wrists stacked, palms facing inward.
motion_description: From a wide posture with arms extended laterally, the practitioner adjusts the left foot inward to form a shoulder-width parallel stance. The hips steadily lower into a partial squat as the arms sweep downward, crossing at the wrists in front of the abdomen with palms facing the torso. Continuing in a smooth flow, the legs straighten to lift the body back up while the crossed arms rise to chest height, concluding with a slow separation of the hands as they settle.
